# Marine Surveys & Inspections MB

## Who we are
Marine Surveys & Inspections MB is an independent marine surveying and ship inspection company based near Klaipėda, Lithuania. We provide technically sound, objective vessel inspections and surveys for clients across the Baltic Sea region and worldwide.

## Contact
- Website: http://www.marinesurveys.eu/
- Email: info@marinesurveys.eu
- Phone: +370 656 44277
- Location: Klaipėda, Lithuania

## Services
- Pre-purchase ship surveys — independent condition assessments before vessel acquisition
- Dry-dock supervision — technical oversight during scheduled maintenance and repair
- On-hire and off-hire surveys — vessel condition documentation at the start and end of charter employment
- Bunker surveys — quantity and quality verification of fuel transfers
- Draft surveys — cargo weight determination by waterline measurement
- P&I surveys — damage, hull and machinery, and risk-focused surveys for P&I clubs and insurers
- Condition monitoring — ongoing fleet condition assessment for owners and managers
- Flag administration inspections — independent on-board inspections supporting registration and statutory certification
- Asset condition assessments — portfolio monitoring for banks, funds and leasing companies

## Who we work with
- European bulk and tanker owners seeking pre-purchase, condition monitoring, and dry-dock planning support
- Third-party shipmanagers requiring technical audits and condition-monitoring input
- Charterers and operators needing on/off-hire, bunker and draft surveys
- Flag administrations and registries requiring independent on-board inspections
- P&I clubs, classification societies, and insurers commissioning damage and risk surveys
- Banks, funds and leasing companies monitoring financed vessel portfolios

## Key facts
- Independent and objective — no affiliation with shipowners, yards, or flag states
- Certified marine surveyors
- Digital reports delivered within 48 hours
- Operates across the Baltic region and internationally
